folio.label: 195v
folio.l: , & bigynnetú the &lb; Secund Nonnes Tale of Seynt Cecile , witú oute a íloge ;
The ministre , and the Norice vn to vices
Whicú æ men clepen , in Englissú , ydelnesse

note.notetxt: note:The scribe is using the dot on the y again. Especially on ydelnesse, see line 7/ODR/

folio.l: That porter at the gate is , of delices
To eschuen , & by hire contrie , hire oppässe
That is to seyn , by leueful bysinesse
Wel ougúte we , to don al oure entente
Leest æ the fend , thurgú ydelnesse vs hente
¢ For he æ w his thousand cordes , slye

note.notetxt: 8Indication in the left margin for a paragraph mark to be included.MP

folio.l: Whan he may man , in ydelnesse espie
He can so ligútly , cacche hi~ in his trappe
Til æ a man be hent , rigút by the lappe
He nys nat war , the fend hath hi~ in honde
Wel ougúte vs werche , & ydelnesse w stonde
¢ And thougú men dradden , neuäe for to dye

note.notetxt: 15Indication in the left margin for a paragraph mark to be included.MP
